query: INSERT INTO sandbox_snapshot (workspace_id, name, tag, s3_key, content_hash, docker_image, size_bytes, status, created_by) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, 'uploaded', $6, 'ready', $7) ON CONFLICT (workspace_id, name, tag) DO UPDATE SET s3_key = $4, content_hash = $5, size_bytes = $6, status = 'ready', build_error = NULL, updated_at = now()
